_doc: Pi reads this from $HOME/.pi/agent/models.json (mounted in via docker-compose).
Built-in providers (anthropic, openai, google, ...) work via env vars alone and do NOT need an entry here.
Add entries here only for: local servers (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM), proxies, or self-hosted endpoints.
"OPENAI_API_KEY"    → resolves at request time from env var of that name (preferred — keeps secret in .env)
"!aws ssm get-..."  → resolves by running the shell command and reading stdout
Reference a model from pipeline.yaml / Agent__Model as <provider-key>/<model-id>, e.g. lmstudio/qwen2.5-coder:7b.
The file hot-reloads on /model in the TUI; in print mode (-p) it's read at process start.

models.name: Lokal modell for å teste oppsett
